name: Springtime Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Asparagus, cooked, cut into bite-size pieces
Fresh ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked pasta and broccoli. Stir in chopped leeks.
3. Add water, sliced mushrooms, snow pea pods, and asparagus pieces to the pasta mixture. Toss well to combine.
4. Season with salad herbs, salt, and pepper. If desired, sprinkle with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
5. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Melt the remaining margarine in the pan.
6. Add the chicken pieces to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
7. Stir in the clams just before serving.
8. Cover the skillet and reduce the heat to low. Cook for 30 to 35 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
9. Serve hot, garnished with additional Parmesan cheese if desired.
